name: Quad City Bank and Trust Company
description_short: Quad City Bank & Trust is a community-focused FDIC-insured bank offering deposit accounts, mortgages, home equity lines of credit, and digital banking services.
description_long: Quad City Bank & Trust (QCBT) is a regional bank positioned as a community-minded financial institution serving the Quad Cities area and surrounding regions. The bank emphasizes local relationships and personalized service, with leadership that prioritizes quick decision-making and accessibility for both individual and business customers. QCBT offers a comprehensive suite of banking services including checking and savings accounts, fixed-rate home equity lines of credit (currently advertised at rates as low as 6.49% APR), mortgage products with multiple home loan programs, and wealth management services. The bank provides digital banking capabilities through online and mobile platforms, including mobile check deposit, bill pay with recurring payment scheduling, digital wallet integration (Apple Pay, Google Pay, Samsung Pay), and Zelle money transfer services. Additionally, they offer credit monitoring tools and account aggregation features allowing customers to view accounts from multiple financial institutions. QCBT distinguishes itself through community engagement, including sponsorship of local events, volunteer support, and maintenance of a community room for nonprofit organizations. The bank emphasizes diversity, equity, and inclusion in its organizational culture. Customer testimonials highlight the bank's accessibility, local presence, understanding of business needs, and speed in decision-making compared to larger institutions. As a traditional regional bank, QCBT's competitive advantages lie primarily in relationship banking and local presence rather than rate leadership. The bank's service offerings are standard for community banks, and customers seeking the absolute lowest rates or widest product selection may find limitations compared to larger national banks or online-only institutions. Planned system upgrades in April 2026 suggest ongoing technology investments.
services: FDIC-insured checking and savings deposit accounts
Fixed-rate home equity lines of credit
Mortgage products and home loan programs
Wealth management services with experienced officers
Bill pay and recurring payment scheduling
Digital wallet integration (Apple Pay, Google Pay, Samsung Pay)
Free credit score monitoring and improvement tools
Account aggregation across multiple financial institutions
Card controls and fraud protection features
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Mobile check deposit available at no charge through smartphone app
Free credit score monitoring and improvement tools included
Digital wallet integration with Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Samsung Pay
Zelle integration for fast money transfer in minutes
Account aggregation feature to view accounts from multiple financial institutions in one place
Community room available as resource for local nonprofit organizations
Emphasis on quick decision-making and accessibility for business customers
cons: Home equity line of credit rate of 6.49% APR advertised as 'low' may not be competitive with other lenders
Limited information provided on savings account rates, CD rates, or checking account fee structures on homepage
Planned banking system downtime April 3-6, 2026 indicates temporary service interruption
Regional bank with limited geographic presence compared to national banks
No mention of investment account options, brokerage services, or alternative investments beyond wealth management
best_for: Homeowners in the Quad Cities area seeking mortgage products or home equity lines of credit with local relationship banking
Small business owners prioritizing accessibility and quick lending decisions from decision-makers who understand their business
Community-minded customers who value supporting local institutions and prefer face-to-face relationships with bank staff
Individuals seeking comprehensive digital banking features including mobile deposit, bill pay, and account aggregation
diagnosis: Quad City Bank & Trust is best for individuals and small businesses in the Quad Cities region seeking traditional community banking with strong personal relationships, digital conveniences, and local decision-making authority. The main caveat is that as a regional bank, QCBT may not offer the most competitive rates or the widest product selection compared to larger national banks or specialized online lenders, and service area appears geographically limited.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
fdic_official_name: Quad City Bank and Trust Company
